overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia walking through a medieval European-style town with timber-framed buildings, cobblestone streets, and villagers. The scene transitions from narrow alleys to open village squares under bright natural daylight, showcasing detailed game engine rendering of a historic urban environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow cobblestone alley between weathered plaster buildings

events.description: woman in blue dress walks past the camera from left to right
exiting the initial courtyard into a narrower timber-framed street

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the narrow alley, passing close to a stone staircase on the left

notable_agents.action: woman in blue dress walking toward and past the camera
villager sitting on the ground against the wall

entered.detail: wooden stairs attached to the building facade leading upward
aged building exterior with peeling plaster and exposed brick patches
traditional half-timbered medieval structure with dark wooden beams
rough wooden support beams crossing overhead between buildings

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a narrow medieval alley with a stone staircase on the left and timber-framed buildings on the right. Geralt walks forward as a woman in a blue dress passes by in the opposite direction, and a villager sits against the wall to the right. The camera moves through the enclosed cobblestone passage toward a wooden archway ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered passage between timber buildings with overhead walkways

events.description: emerging from shadow into brighter sunlight as the alley opens slightly
passing under a large stone archway into a more open village area

agents.ego_description: continuing through the narrow street toward the stone archway ahead

notable_agents.action: woman in red dress walking alongside Geralt in the same direction
villager sitting near a wooden bench against the wall

entered.detail: large stone passage with rounded top leading to the next district
wooden walkway connecting the upper floors of buildings across the street
tall distinctive building with dark wooden beams visible through the arch

segments.scene_description: Walking through a narrow street lined with timber-framed buildings on both sides, Geralt approaches a large stone archway. A wooden overhead bridge connects the buildings above. The lighting brightens as the character moves toward the arch, with a distinctive half-timbered tower becoming visible in the distance. A woman in a red dress walks alongside briefly before the segment ends.

scene_state.functional_zone: open village square with livestock and scattered timber houses

events.description: entering area with domestic pigs roaming freely in the village square
turning slightly right to navigate around villagers and animals

agents.ego_description: walking through the open village square observing the surroundings and villagers

notable_agents.action: elderly villager herding pigs across the cobblestone path
pigs roaming freely and foraging in the village square

entered.detail: traditional house with straw roofing and timber frame walls
large wooden wagon with spoked wheels parked beside the path
simple wooden railing along the edge of the path

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the narrow passage, the scene opens into a sunlit village square with thatched-roof cottages and a wooden cart. Pigs roam freely across the cobblestones while an elderly villager tends to them. The half-timbered tower seen earlier is now closer on the left. The environment feels more open and rural compared to the enclosed alleys.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow market street with hanging banners and wooden structures

events.description: passing through a stone archway into a different district with market stalls
walking close to a wooden cart temporarily blocking the right side of view

agents.ego_description: navigating through the narrow street passing other villagers

notable_agents.action: villager in brown tunic and green cap walking ahead
person in blue cloak walking away from the camera

entered.detail: arched stone tunnel connecting different parts of the town
cloth and banners strung on ropes between buildings overhead
simple wooden structure with goods displayed

segments.scene_description: The character enters another narrow street section featuring a stone archway ahead. Hanging laundry and banners are strung between the timber buildings overhead. A wooden market stall appears on the right as Geralt passes through the passage. Other villagers walk ahead in the same direction, including one in a distinctive blue cloak.

scene_state.functional_zone: courtyard with red brick building and woodworking area

events.description: entering the final courtyard area with the prominent red brick building
slowing pace while approaching villagers working at benches

agents.ego_description: approaching the workers in the courtyard, observing their activities

notable_agents.action: villager hammering and working at a wooden workbench
worker leaning over a table with carpentry tools

entered.detail: tall brick structure with large arched windows and industrial appearance
work table with carpentry tools and materials
circular stone structure in the courtyard center

segments.scene_description: The final segment opens into a courtyard dominated by a distinctive red brick building with large windows. Villagers work at wooden workbenches on the right, hammering and crafting. The architecture shifts from pure timber-framing to include this brick industrial-style structure. The scene ends as Geralt approaches the workers in the sunlit courtyard.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a medieval town that transitions from enclosed, narrow alleys into open, sunlit communal spaces. It begins in a tight cobblestone passage flanked by timber-framed buildings and a stone staircase, moving past villagers toward a wooden archway. As the camera progresses through a street topped with an overhead bridge, the lighting brightens and the view expands through a stone arch into a wide village square filled with thatched-roof cottages, roaming pigs, and a distant half-timbered tower. The scene then shifts back into a narrow corridor adorned with hanging laundry and banners before passing a wooden market stall. Finally, the environment opens into a bright courtyard where the architecture shifts to a red brick industrial building, ending as the camera approaches villagers working at wooden benches.
